Auto Transport Services — Car Shipping by Rastaman Logistics

Rastaman Logistics provides professional auto transport and car shipping solutions for customers across the United States. Whether you need open carrier vehicle transport for everyday cars or enclosed shipping for high-value collectibles, our nationwide network of vetted carriers delivers safe, reliable door-to-door service. From expedited auto transport with priority pickup to standard car shipping at competitive rates, we handle every detail so your vehicle arrives on time and damage-free.

Open Auto Transport

The most popular and affordable way to ship a vehicle. Your car rides on an open multi-car carrier — the same method trusted by dealerships and manufacturers across the country.

Learn more

Enclosed Auto Transport

Premium protection for luxury, classic, and exotic vehicles. Your car travels inside a fully enclosed trailer, shielded from weather, road debris, and prying eyes.

Learn more

Door-to-Door Car Shipping

We pick up your vehicle from your location and deliver it directly to your destination — no terminals, no extra trips, no hassle. Available on every route we serve.

Learn more

Expedited Car Shipping

Need your vehicle shipped fast? Our expedited service guarantees priority pickup within 24–48 hours and faster transit times through direct carrier routing.

Learn more

RASTAMAN LOGISTICS

Licensed auto transport broker specializing in safe, reliable nationwide vehicle shipping across the United States.

Services

  • Open Auto Transport
  • Enclosed Transport
  • Door-to-Door Shipping
  • Expedited Shipping
